meaning: n.[动]小袋鼠,<复><口>澳洲土人
examples: An albino wallaby born into captivity is pictured at a private zoo in Ayios Georgios, Cyprus.
Just as he was losing consciousness, he heard a faint squeak and looked down to see a baby wallaby that had fallen from its mother's pouch.
We are the world's best wallaby support group.
He played down Wallaby coach Eddie Jones' talk of Scotland playing "last-resort" rugby against Australia.
There will not be too many better opportunities to beat a Wallaby side on Australian soil.
